prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon race preparation - carb loading day before race

solution_criteria: Meals distributed across breakfast, lunch, dinner with snacks
task_description: write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a marathon runner requiring high carbohydrate intake (3000+ calories) for race preparation day

prompt_inputs.goal: maintain energy for twice-daily swim training while supporting teenage growth

solution_criteria: Provides 6 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day
Includes adequate protein (100-120g) and carbohydrates for training recovery
Uses affordable, accessible ingredients suitable for a moderate budget
task_description: write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a teenage swimmer (16 years old) needing balanced nutrition for training and growth on a moderate budget

prompt_inputs.goal: cutting phase - lose fat while maintaining muscle, targeting 1800 calories daily with 40% protein

solution_criteria: Protein content around 40% of total calories (180g)
Includes breakfast, lunch, dinner with specific foods and portions
task_description: write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a weightlifter on a cutting phase needing high protein, low calorie meals (1800 calories, 40% protein)
